metadata.title: João Gabriel Lima | Web Developer & Product Builder
metadata.description: I design and build web products end to end: UX, front-end, and production-ready delivery. Browse projects, experience, and how to reach me.

hero.sub: Modern interfaces, high performance and a focus on what matters: shipping things that actually works.

designSystem.heading: Design system
designSystem.intro: Foundations, tokens, and shadcn/ui primitives for this site. For author reference; not in the main navigation.
designSystem.brandBody: Hero-style gradient; single utility class to keep copy consistent.
designSystem.spacingNote: Follows Tailwind’s default scale; rem values match spacing-* utilities.
designSystem.radiusNote: The base --radius in globals.css drives shadcn components (e.g. buttons, cards).
